🇺🇸 AM General (@AMGeneral_LLC) showcased its unmanned ground vehicle (UGV) with counter-drone configurations during Modern Day Marine (@ModernDayMarine).

Debuted in March at AUSA Global Force, the UGV is a collaboration between Carnegie Robotics that integrated robust,low-cost autonomy stack and Textron Systems hardware and software control layer.

At the show UGV is equipped with Moog's Reconfigurable Self‑Loading Equipment Dock (MR SLED) - a modular, mission‑ready Air  Defense/C‑UAS solution built around the proven RIwP® turret fielded on  SGT Stout and MLIDS.

And there is enough room for Swarmbotic's FireAnt attritable sUGV.

Learn more >> https://t.co/pHjsmVmDU9

@Moog_Inc @SwarmboticsAI @CarnegieRobotic @TXTSystems

profile_bio.description: Counter Unmanned Systems is your go-to source for the latest developments in countering unmanned systems in all domains. From defense to civilian applications,

kept.text:
We caught up with electronic artist, @slowmagic on the set of the "End Credits" music video, where the Moog Messenger makes an appearance both on screen and in the track.

He shared that the Moog bass has always inspired him—and how the Messenger’s Res Bass lets him push resonance while keeping that low end locked in. 🔒

Check out "End Credits" and the Emotion Engine album to hear it all in action.

profile_bio.description: Hand-crafted analog synthesizers  • continuing the legacy of Dr. Bob Moog
